prompt:
STYLE: a hyper-realistic premium studio product shot, 1:1 square, 4K. Editorial / commercial-catalog style — clean studio environment with refined accent lighting, no text.

SUBJECT: a photorealistic rendering of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar shown from a SLIGHT TOP-DOWN ANGLE looking down toward the GOLD LID (approximately 30-40° down from horizontal — so the GOLD LID surface is the dominant element visible, with the front label of the jar tapering visible below). Matching the provided reference — black plastic jar, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID on top, jar CLOSED, front label legible. The jar occupies roughly the central 55-60% of the frame height — ZOOMED OUT with generous breathing room around the composition.

LIGHTING — refined accent lighting: a soft large key-light from upper-left grazing across the gold lid surface so the lid catches a beautiful warm gleam, soft fill from the right, a subtle COOL BLUE rim-light catching the LEFT edge of the curved black plastic, a WARM GOLD rim-light catching the RIGHT edge — duotone dimensionality. Clean specular highlight on the curved sides. Label reads crisply.

BACKDROP: pure WHITE seamless studio backdrop — no gradient, no horizon line, no atmospheric haze. The jar sits on a clean even WHITE surface with only a SOFT NATURAL DROP-SHADOW directly beneath it (no glossy mirror reflection, no warm cream-gray tones). The scene around the product stays pure white throughout.

NO TEXT, NO graphic overlays, NO scattered gummies, NO props.

STYLE: hyper-realistic product photography, 100mm macro look, f/8 sharp focus, crystal-clear label legibility, editorial commercial product shot. Hyper-detailed plastic textures with realistic light absorption, the gold lid catches a clean warm highlight that makes it pop. Magazine-print quality.
